title: About the Time I First Met Her.
overview: Tsutsui and Iroha are forced to clean the pool together as punishment for being late. But is it the start of something more?

title: About the Time My Chastity was in a Predicament.
overview: Tsutsui discovers that real life relationships aren't always easy to navigate as he and Iroha's relationship starts to bloom.

title: About the Time Normies Made Me Even Worse.
overview: Tsutsui struggles with growing feelings he has for his real world girl and receives advice from an unexpected source.

title: About My Dark Times.
overview: Tsutsui receives a mysterious letter to meet someone at the gym. Could this be some kind of confession or will it be a trap.

title: About When I Tried to Make Summer Memories.
overview: Tsutsui struggles to voice his feelings for Iroha while they deal with the aftermath of the mysterious letter.

title: About the Way I Apologize.
overview: After an argument with both Itou and Iroha, Tsutsui tries to figure out how to apologize.

title: About the Two Girls and Me.
overview: Iroha and Tsutsui struggle to navigate their feelings and jealousy within their relationship because of the newcomer in their group of friends.

title: About How Camping Was a High-Level Event for Me.
overview: Emotions run high all weekend while the gang is at the cabin, causing conflict around every corner.

title: About Our Mutual Misunderstandings.
overview: Tsutsui and his 3D girl struggle to work through the aftermath of what happened at the cabin. Will this be the end?

title: About My Confession.
overview: Tsutsui finally deals with the awkwardness of Ayado's confession and the aftermath it brings to his relationship.

title: About the Love of a Best Friend That I Worry About.
overview: Despite Tsutsui's honest intentions, he ends up causing more harm than good when he suggests that Ito invite Ayado to see a movie.

title: About the Shape of Our Love.
overview: Tsutsui tries to prove what his relationship with Iroha means after her brother's surprising arrival home.

title: Regarding the Time We Put One Foot in the Normie World.
overview: Nothing can save Tsutsui from the normie event of the season: The Culture Festival. Will the gang be able to pull it together to have an event to remember?

title: Regarding the Time We Had Important Roles in the School Festival.
overview: The Culture Festival is in full swing, which means the gang must step up to the plate and make sure the whole school has a good time, no matter how awkward it may be.

title: Regarding My Unforseen Family Crisis.
overview: Hikari welcomes the return of normalcy with sweet relief, but it doesn't last after he finds his dad at a cafe with a woman who isn't his mom.

title: Regarding the Untold Story of My Parents' Courtship.
overview: Tsutsui's family is at a crossroads. Some families can survive betrayals, but others cannot. One thing remains clear though: Trust isn't so easily repaired once broken.

title: Regarding Miss Ayado's New Mental Anguish.
overview: When Ayado's manga-inspired fantasies derail her date with Ito, she realizes dating in 3D is a lot more complicated than it looks.

title: Regarding the Courtship of My Female Friend Ishino.
overview: Ishino has finally scored a date with Takanashi! But they aren't the only ones visiting the aquarium this afternoon...

title: Regarding the Troubling Invitation from My Girlfriend.
overview: Why has Ito gone to Takanashi for advice? Shouldn't he be asking Tsutsui for help, instead? They're best friends, after all, and — wait, Ito asked Takanashi about WHAT?

title: Regarding When My Friend and My Maybe Friend Became Official.
overview: When Takanashi's mother is hospitalized, Ishino steps in to help cook dinner. She means well, but will Takanashi just see this as more of Ishino's meddling?

title: Regarding My Choice to Have No Regrets in My High School Life
overview: As college entrance exams loom large, Tsutsui's grades begin to slip. Has he stopped caring about his future, or is something else distracting him?

title: Regarding My Thoughts on the Sacred Mysteries of Life.
overview: Iroha's time with Tsutsui will come to an end in just one month -- so why is she avoiding him?

title: Regarding My Last Promise to Her.
overview: Tsutsui has been in a rut ever since he said goodbye to Iroha. Can his friends snap him out of it before their college entrance exams?

title: Regarding Her Future and Mine.
overview: No matter what happens to your memory, they say the heart never forgets.
